products.name: BUCK CHOW HIGH PROTEIN FEED-40LB
products.short_description: “Extra Inches Aren’t An Accident” The perfect balance of attraction and nutrition, Buck Chow is a complete, 20% high protein deer feed, featuring GB Feed’s Real Results Protein Pellets and antler growing minerals combined with all natural grains and roasted soybeans to deliver ye
products.description_text: “Extra Inches Aren’t An Accident” The perfect balance of attraction and nutrition, Buck Chow is a complete, 20% high protein deer feed, featuring GB Feed’s Real Results Protein Pellets and antler growing minerals combined with all natural grains and roasted soybeans to deliver year round attraction and nutrition for better herd health and maximum antler growth. Tested and proven right here in the Midwest Designed to be fed year-round from early spring all the way through shed season Includes minerals such as Calcium and Phosphorus for optimal herd health and antler growth Long Range Aroma To Attract Deer Can be used in gravity feeders, spin feeders or ground piles Over 5,000 inches of proven results and counting!
products.description_formatted:
“Extra Inches Aren’t An Accident”
The perfect balance of attraction and nutrition, Buck Chow is a complete, 20% high protein deer feed, featuring GB Feed’s Real Results Protein Pellets and antler growing minerals combined with all natural grains and roasted soybeans to deliver year round attraction and nutrition for better herd health and maximum antler growth.
- Tested and proven right here in the Midwest
- Designed to be fed year-round from early spring all the way through shed season
- Includes minerals such as Calcium and Phosphorus for optimal herd health and antler growth
- Long Range Aroma To Attract Deer
- Can be used in gravity feeders, spin feeders or ground piles
- Over 5,000 inches of proven results and counting!

products.name: CORN CANDY FLAVORED ATTRACTANT
products.short_description: “Turn Your Corn Into Deer Candy” Designed to enhance the Aroma, Flavor and Nutrition of your whole corn, Corn Candy is the secret weapon to help deer find your feed site quicker and come back more often. Corn Candy can be added into your feeder with your whole corn or over the to
products.description_text: “Turn Your Corn Into Deer Candy” Designed to enhance the Aroma, Flavor and Nutrition of your whole corn, Corn Candy is the secret weapon to help deer find your feed site quicker and come back more often. Corn Candy can be added into your feeder with your whole corn or over the top of a ground pile feed site to increase the attractiveness and give you the edge over other hunters in your area. Each 7lb bag treats approximately 500lbs of corn Helps deer find your feed 5X faster than regular corn Economical way to enhance your deer feed Allows you to pull deer from longer ranges
products.description_formatted:
“Turn Your Corn Into Deer Candy”
Designed to enhance the Aroma, Flavor and Nutrition of your whole corn, Corn Candy is the secret weapon to help deer find your feed site quicker and come back more often. Corn Candy can be added into your feeder with your whole corn or over the top of a ground pile feed site to increase the attractiveness and give you the edge over other hunters in your area.
- Each 7lb bag treats approximately 500lbs of corn
- Helps deer find your feed 5X faster than regular corn
- Economical way to enhance your deer feed
- Allows you to pull deer from longer ranges

products.description_text: Tactacam's REVEAL X 2.0 combines long-lasting power performance with remarkable image quality, day or night. products.description_text: Tactacam's REVEAL Adjustable Camera Stake is a secure telescopic mounting stick for ground installation of your REVEAL cellular camera. Easy setup; no tools required.
